response.global_analysis: Strict Verification Step: 1. Audio phonetically matches the outro/bridge of 'Kanade' and the beginning of 'No title' by Reol. 2. The reference JSON provided lyrics for the start of 'Kanade' which are not in this segment; I discarded them and used the actual sung lyrics. 3. Identified the second song as 'No title' via on-screen text at 03:48. 4. Confirmed all timestamps tightly wrap vocal activation and respected mid-sentence pauses. 5. Translations are context-aware, reflecting the themes of parting and artistic growth in the two songs.

subtitles.original: …その役目が
subtitles.english: ...that role of mine

subtitles.original: 僕の使命だなんて そう思ってた
subtitles.english: Was my mission in life, or so I thought

subtitles.original: だけど今わかったんだ 僕らならもう
subtitles.english: But now I understand; for the two of us,

subtitles.original: 重ねた日々がほら、導いてくれる
subtitles.english: Look, the days we've spent together will guide us.

subtitles.original: 君が大人になってくその時間が
subtitles.english: While the time you spend becoming an adult

subtitles.original: 降り積もる間に僕も変わってく
subtitles.english: Piles up, I will change as well.

subtitles.original: たとえばそこにこんな歌があれば
subtitles.english: For example, if there were a song like this,

subtitles.original: ふたりはいつもどんな時もつながっていける
subtitles.english: We could stay connected always, no matter the time.

subtitles.original: 突然ふいに鳴り響くベルの音
subtitles.english: Suddenly, the sound of the departure bell rings out.

subtitles.original: 焦る僕 解ける手 離れてく君
subtitles.english: I panic, our hands part, and you move away.

subtitles.original: 夢中で呼び止めて 抱きしめたんだ
subtitles.english: Frantically, I called out to stop you and held you tight.

subtitles.original: 君がどこに行ったって僕の声で守るよ
subtitles.english: No matter where you go, I will protect you with my voice.

subtitles.original: 君が僕の前に現れた日から
subtitles.english: From the day you first appeared before me,

subtitles.original: 何もかもが違くみえたんだ
subtitles.english: Everything started to look different.

subtitles.original: 朝も光も涙も、歌う声も
subtitles.english: The morning, the light, the tears, and even my singing voice...

subtitles.original: 君が輝きをくれたんだ
subtitles.english: You were the one who gave them their shine.

subtitles.original: 抑えきれない思いをこの声に乗せて
subtitles.english: I'll put these uncontrollable feelings into my voice

subtitles.original: 遠く君の街へ届けよう
subtitles.english: And deliver them to your distant town.

subtitles.original: たとえばそれがこんな歌だったら
subtitles.english: For example, if it were a song like this,

subtitles.original: ぼくらは何処にいたとしてもつながっていける
subtitles.english: We could stay connected no matter where we are.

subtitles.original: No title / 作詞・作曲: Reol
subtitles.english: No title / Lyrics & Music: Reol

subtitles.original: ずっと夢見てた僕になれたかな
subtitles.english: Have I become the person I always dreamed I'd be?

subtitles.original: とうに帰れないとこまで来たみたい
subtitles.english: It seems I've come to a point of no return.

subtitles.original: 自分の足で二段飛ばして
subtitles.english: Taking two steps at a time with my own feet,

subtitles.original: そうもっと先へ駆けていけるはずだから ran away
subtitles.english: I should be able to run further ahead, so I ran away.

subtitles.original: 深くなる傷を縫い付け
subtitles.english: Sewing up the wounds that grow deeper,

subtitles.original: 繋ぐパス軸に回りだす
subtitles.english: I start to spin around the path I connect.

subtitles.original: なれた痛み、焦る呼吸とビート
subtitles.english: This familiar pain, my frantic breathing and the beat—

subtitles.original: 気付かないふりしてまた一人
subtitles.english: I pretend not to notice and find myself alone again.

subtitles.original: 何が正当？ないな永劫
subtitles.english: What is 'correct'? Nothing lasts forever.

subtitles.original: 誰が間違った対価払うの
subtitles.english: Who will pay the price for the mistakes made?

subtitles.original: あんたが嫌いなあいつはきっと
subtitles.english: That person you hate is surely

subtitles.original: ただ「それだけ」で不正解なんだ
subtitles.english: 'incorrect' just because of that one thing.

subtitles.original: 零点だって提言したって
subtitles.english: Even if I'm told I've scored a zero,

subtitles.original: 全然納得できない理由も
subtitles.english: The reason I can't accept it at all is because

subtitles.original: 最前線はいつだってここだった
subtitles.english: The front line has always been right here.

subtitles.original: 最善策は最初からなかった
subtitles.english: There was never a 'best strategy' from the start.

subtitles.original: 緩やかに崩れ壊れてく
subtitles.english: Slowly, I'm crumbling and breaking apart.

subtitles.original: ゆるりゆるり首を絞めるように
subtitles.english: Slowly, slowly, as if being strangled,

subtitles.original: 昨日までの僕が殺されていく
subtitles.english: The 'me' from yesterday is being killed off.

subtitles.original: 緩やかに離れ離れあく
subtitles.english: Gently, we are pulled further apart.

subtitles.original: グラリンリ君に聞こえるのは
subtitles.english: Swaying and shaking, what you hear

subtitles.original: 僕が知らない声になってく
subtitles.english: Is becoming a voice I no longer recognize.
